sections.content:
The action was stopped early. It only executed 4 actions out of 13 requested. Looking at the result, it seems like the action was interrupted. Let me check the current state and continue removing green blocks.
Looking at the current image, I can see:
- The top row of green blocks (row 25-29) has been partially removed: cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29, 31-35 are gone
- The remaining green blocks are at cols 37-41, 43-47, 49-53 in the top row
- The bottom row of green blocks (row 31-35) is still intact at all positions
Wait, looking more carefully at the image:
- Top row: green blocks at cols 37-41, 43-47, 49-53 are still there (3 blocks)
- Bottom row: green blocks at cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29, 31-35, 37-41, 43-47, 49-53 are still there (7 blocks)
- The green block at row=33, col=21 (cols 19-23 in bottom row) is still there
So 4 green blocks were removed (top row, cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29, 31-35).
I need to continue removing the remaining green blocks, skipping the one at row=33, col=21.
Remaining green blocks to remove:
- Top row: cols 37-41, 43-47, 49-53 (3 blocks)
- Bottom row: cols 13-17, 25-29, 31-35, 37-41, 43-47, 49-53 (6 blocks, skipping 19-23)
Total: 9 blocks to remove.
Let me continue.
